title: ammi majus var. daucifolium
intro: Ammi majus var. daucifolium, also known as Daucus carota, is a variety of Queen Anne's lace, a flowering plant in the carrot family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as relieving menstrual cramps, reducing fever, and soothing digestive issues. Ammi majus var. daucifolium can be used to make herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support women's health and alleviate various symptoms.
